basic_details.job_title: TMC Mumbai Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre Mumbai (TMC Mumbai) Senior Resident (Surgical Oncology) Notification 2026 has been released on 25 April 2026 on the official website tmc.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the TMC Mumbai Senior Resident (Surgical Oncology) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation is applicable: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for Physically Handicapped candidates.

qualification.details: M.S./D.N.B. (General Surgery) or equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by NMC

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for TMC Mumbai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident (Surgical Oncology) posts will be conducted from 25 April 2026 to 15 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend within this period.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Senior Resident (Surgical Oncology) position at Tata Memorial Centre Mumbai.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is M.S./D.N.B. (General Surgery) or an equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by the National Medical Commission (NMC).

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Resident post is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. ₹ 1,33,623/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a walk-in recruitment. Interested and eligible candidates need to attend the walk-in interview at the specified venue and time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The official notification should be checked for the exact venue details. However, the advertisement number suggests the location might be related to Varanasi.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Senior Resident position is contractual.
